title: Evangelion Vs Slave Zero
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Vs Slave Zero             Quote Post by BGMLV » Sun Jan 17, 2010 11:38 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VLQ9hB-TN5Y Do you see the similarities between those different mechs? Which one do you think is the coolest?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Jan 18, 2010 12:55 am Ehh, any giant kinda living "robot" machine thing can be said to have come from Eva. Elreka 7 or however you spell it has robots that turn out to be alive under all that armor. Search on youtube "Eva vs Elreka 7"

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 18, 2010 12:08 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Ehh, any giant kinda living "robot" machine thing can be said to have come from Eva. Elreka 7 or however you spell it has robots that turn out to be alive under all that armor. Search on youtube "Eva vs Elreka 7"

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 18, 2010 12:22 pm I've never heard of Slave Zero before today, so I'd have to stick with Eva for "coolness". I would be curious if the lead designers patterned the game after anime like Eva, but I doubt Eva was a direct influence.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 18, 2010 12:25 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I've never heard of Slave Zero before today, so I'd have to stick with Eva for "coolness". I would be curious if the lead designers patterned the game after anime like Eva, but I doubt Eva was a direct influence.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 18, 2010 12:28 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: ya never know.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Mon Jan 18, 2010 11:35 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: its euraka 7 otakon. it was overated to say the least.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Tue Jan 19, 2010 10:47 am How was Erueka 7like Evangelion in any way besides the living robot? It's more similar to Gundam X, because it's essentially just a romance anime with bad supporting characters (Holland in particular) and Macross action.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 19, 2010 11:20 am Taekmkm wrote: How was Erueka 7like Evangelion in any way besides the living robot?

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Tue Jan 19, 2010 11:28 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Ehh, any giant kinda living "robot" machine thing can be said to have come from Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 19, 2010 12:08 pm LiLi wrote: Actually, IMO the Evangelions themselves could be said to come from the God Warrior in Miyazaki's Nausica - and since Anno even worked on animating the God Warrior for the Nausica movie, the idea doesn't seem far fetched to me.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Tue Jan 19, 2010 12:31 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Except the God Warrior in Nausicaa isn't a robot,

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 19, 2010 12:48 pm Mazinger bleeds blood (even out of its mouth). And its pilot sits in a capsule filled with liquid.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Tue Jan 19, 2010 12:51 pm Ornette wrote: Mazinger bleeds blood (even out of its mouth). And its pilot sits in a capsule filled with liquid.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 19, 2010 12:58 pm It's shown in the manga, I don't think we ever see the capsule fill with liquid in the anime. Not that's it's anything important.
